title: kubernetes_thw vars
description: Variables for Kubernetes The Hard Way

KUBERNETES_THW_VERSION.description: Specific version of kubernetes components to install

VARS.description: Key/value in JSON format (as an escaped string)

LIBSCRIPT_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Global unix socket to listen on

KUBERNETES_THW_LISTEN_PORT.description: Port for KUBERNETES_THW to listen on

KUBERNETES_THW_LISTEN_ADDRESS.description: Address for KUBERNETES_THW to listen on

KUBERNETES_THW_LISTEN_SOCKET.description: Unix socket for KUBERNETES_THW to listen on
